details.attacks: 1 x attacks (2d6 by fist or weapon)
details.special: PSI:Mind Bar, Telekinesis, Mind Link, Thought Shield, Crush Life WT: Life Detection, All-Round Vision, Know Direction, Powers: 8 Rank: 2nd Drain Water: A successful hit by a thrax on an unarmored victim causes 2d6 points of damage, and the victim must save vs. petrification, and on a failure, the victim starts losing water from their body. After 2 rounds in this state, the victim dies dehydrated.

system.description:
Tareks are big, musclebound, and aggressive humanoids. They are difficult to kill — even fatal blows may not stop them.
